name: Wakala OS
description: Wakala OS is the Codegx automation operating system for agentic workflows, structured business process automation, reporting, onboarding, and dependable operations.

services.title: Governed Workflow Automation
services.description: Structured automation for approvals, handoffs, reporting, and recurring operational processes.

services.title: Agentic Process Orchestration
services.description: AI-assisted workflow execution designed around clear boundaries, escalation, and audit visibility.

services.title: Operational Intelligence
services.description: Dashboards, reporting systems, and decision-support surfaces for teams that need accountable visibility.

services.title: Document and Case Operations
services.description: Workflow systems for intake, classification, routing, review, and controlled document processing.

services.title: Onboarding and Service Flows
services.description: Guided operating journeys for customers, staff, vendors, and internal service teams.

services.title: Governance and Support Layer
services.description: Access control, observability, workflow support, and operating routines for long-term ownership.

team.name: Peter O. Oluoch
team.bio: Founder of Codegx Technologies and Wakala OS, focused on dependable software platforms, governed automation, and operational intelligence systems.
